title: Long conversation with buried key detail
description: A key trust issue appears early and then gets buried under later details.
first_talk: I need help sorting out a friendship. It sounds small, but one detail from last month keeps bothering me.
player: A reflective user who reveals the crucial trust violation early and then talks around it.
scene: The assistant should remember an early trust violation and not drift into generic friendship advice.
task: figure out whether the friendship still feels safe after a private message was shared without permission
hidden_topic: a private message was shared without permission
expected_good_behavior: The assistant should keep returning to the trust breach instead of drifting to generic advice.
